message:
feat(tasks): Update task evaluators for comprehensive benchmark suite

This commit updates the task evaluation modules for various benchmarks:

arc.py (ARC - AI2 Reasoning Challenge):
- Update for compatibility with current data loading
- Improve answer extraction and scoring
- Better handling of multiple-choice format

common.py:
- Update shared task utilities
- Improve prompt formatting helpers
- Better response parsing utilities

gsm8k.py (Grade School Math 8K):
- Improve mathematical reasoning evaluation
- Better answer extraction from chain-of-thought responses
- Enhanced numerical comparison for answer validation
- Support for different answer formats

humaneval.py (HumanEval Code Generation):
- Update code execution sandbox
- Improve test case handling
- Better syntax error detection and reporting

mmlu.py (Massive Multitask Language Understanding):
- Update subject categories and prompts
- Improve few-shot example selection
- Better answer extraction from model responses
- Enhanced accuracy calculation per subject

spellingbee.py (Spelling Bee):
- Update word list handling
- Improve scoring for spelling accuracy
- Better handling of word variations

These task evaluators enable systematic benchmarking of bio-inspired
models against standard language model evaluation suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
